title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 517.021 - Rules of civil procedure to apply
text:
517.021.  Rules of civil procedure to apply. — The rules of civil procedure shall apply to cases or classes of cases to which this chapter is applicable, except where otherwise provided by law.
(L. 1985 S.B. 5, et al., A.L. 1988 H.B. 1660)
